mnemonics: Work Backwards Like a Movie Director (Watching the Final Scene First)
Solve from the End to Prevent a Bad Spend
keyPoints: A recursive algorithm for solving finite sequential games.
It starts from the final decision nodes and works backwards to the root.
It assumes perfect information and rational play (subgame perfection).
commonMistakes: Applying it to games with simultaneous moves or imperfect information.
Forgetting to consider all possible actions at each node, leading to an incomplete solution.
Assuming players will always make the move that is best for the collective rather than their individual self-interest.
